item.title: Version 1.3.2
item.description: - Area screenshot to clipboard and OCR/translation paths now use ScreenCaptureKit's SCScreenshotManager instead of the deprecated CGWindowListCreateImage. macOS 15 was nagging users to re-grant Screen Recording permission once a month for any app still on the legacy API; the modern API doesn't trigger the prompt. - Recording errors are no longer silent: when a recording produces an empty file (e.g. permission missing, no frames received, asset writer error) the menu bar now surfaces the actual reason instead of the overlay just disappearing. - Removed Utilities/CGWindowCapture.h/.m and the now-empty bridging header reference. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description: - Re-cut v1.3.0 to push the appcast forward — auto-update users were stuck on v1.2.6 because the previous release didn't refresh appcast.xml - In-place translation overlay replaces the popup: translated text is composited onto the captured screenshot at the exact screen coordinates you dragged - Movable overlay with Save, Copy, and Close toolbar buttons; Cmd+S saves to the screenshots library, Cmd+C copies the composite, Esc dismisses - Claude API translation engine as an alternative to Apple's on-device translator (segments batched into one Messages API call for speed) - Settings → Translation panel for picking the engine and storing an Anthropic API key in the Keychain Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description: - In-place translation overlay replaces the popup: translated text is composited onto the captured screenshot and shown at the exact screen coordinates you dragged, with original text masked behind a sampled background color - Movable overlay with Save, Copy, and Close toolbar buttons; Cmd+S saves to the screenshots library, Cmd+C copies the composite, Esc dismisses - Claude API translation engine as an alternative to Apple's on-device translator (segments batched into one Messages API call for speed) - Settings → Translation panel for picking the engine and storing an Anthropic API key in the Keychain Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)

item.title: Version 1.2.6
item.description:
• Translation popup appears instantly on mouse release
  • Popup redesigned to match the Morse style
  • Bold typography, solid background, icon-only buttons

item.title: Version 1.2.5
item.description:
• Translation popup redesigned to match the Morse style
  • Bold typography, solid background, icon-only buttons
  • Releases now trigger automatically when Info.plist is bumped

item.title: Version 1.2.4
item.description:
• Translation popup redesigned to match the Morse style
  • Bold typography, solid background, icon-only buttons
  • Releases now trigger automatically when Info.plist is bumped

item.title: Version 1.2.3
item.description: Fix release workflow: copy artifacts before branch swap (#3) mv left Captr.dmg and appcast.xml as staged deletions, blocking git pull --rebase. Copy + git reset --hard HEAD instead, then swap to main and copy back. Unblocks the v1.2.3 release.

item.title: Version 1.2.2
item.description:
• Improved stability and permissions handling
  • Notarized with Developer ID for Gatekeeper-free installs

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
• Notarized with Developer ID for Gatekeeper-free installs
  • Translate to English — select any on-screen text (Cmd+Shift+E)
  • Translation results shown in a floating popup with optional copy

item.title: Version 1.2
item.description:
• New: Translate to English — select any on-screen text (Cmd+Shift+E) to translate it instantly
  • Translation results shown in a floating popup with optional copy
  • Requires macOS 15 (Sequoia) or later

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
• Added automatic update support via Sparkle
  • Check for Updates option in menu bar
